description: Anthropic Messages streaming that mixes a JSON response tool with other tool calls. Validates that JSON response tools do not leak tool-call content when they are represented as text.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: JSON response tools may stream their output as plain text blocks; tool-call content should be ignored accordingly.
